title: AXSchedulerBlockIdentifier
description: Identifies a specific time block within a scheduler view.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Interface representing a block identifier with day and block indices.

data.content: interface AXSchedulerBlockIdentifier { dayIndex: number; blockIndex: number; }

props.name: dayIndex
props.description: Index of the day within the view.

props.name: blockIndex
props.description: Index of the time block within the day.
